title: phleum michelii subsp. ambiguum
intro: Phleum michelii subsp. ambiguum, also known as the Timothy grass, is a type of grass that belongs to the family Poaceae. It has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties. The health benefits of Phleum michelii subsp. ambiguum include its ability to soothe digestive issues, reduce inflammation, and provide relief from respiratory problems. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures, which are often used to harness its medicinal properties.
